subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Dear Bob,

Thank you for following up regarding a potential partnership between Vendor Inc. and our team. It was great to connect with you at the conference last month.

I'd be happy to schedule a meeting to explore collaboration opportunities. Please let me know if any of the following slots work for you:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00  
- Thursday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to share internal contact information. For all partnership and technical inquiries, please refer to our public website at www.company.com/contact where you'll find appropriate channels for reaching our leadership team.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company
